response.justification: Bogdan is a seasoned full-stack engineer with 13+ years of experience, strong software craftsmanship (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development), and exposure to high-throughput systems at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic. However, the resume shows no direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing frameworks, telemetry/metrics infrastructure, or statistical analysis — the core of this Principal/IC6 Growth role. He also lacks evidence of Principal-level scope (multi-team architectural ownership, cross-org influence) and the listed languages skew toward TypeScript/DLang rather than the C/C#/Java/Python stack typical of large-scale measurement platforms. Worth a screening call to probe depth on systemic design and growth/measurement work, but he reads more as a strong senior/staff full-stack engineer than an IC6 experimentation-systems principal.
strengths: 13+ years across web, mobile, embedded; experience with high-throughput microservices handling millions of req/s at Sociomantic
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus teaching/workshop background (mentorship signal)
Recent AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling work aligns with the AI-first framing of the role
concerns: No demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, A/B testing, or rollout/risk controls
No evidence of metrics/telemetry infrastructure, statistical analysis, or data-science partnership at platform scale
Scope reads as senior/staff IC contributor rather than Principal/IC6 — limited signal of multi-team architectural leadership or cross-org influence

key_factors.factor: Strong engineering fundamentals and high-scale systems background
